news.headline: NBA playoffs 2026: Previewing all 20 teams still vying for the title
news.description: Everything you need to know for the Thunder, Pistons, Spurs, Celtics and 16 other teams chasing the 2026 NBA title.

news.headline: NBA offseason: Draft, free agency, trade targets for eliminated teams
news.description: Summer is here for 14 franchises that missed the playoffs. What lies ahead for the Warriors, Clippers, Bucks and each eliminated team?

news.headline: 2026 NBA playoffs: Schedule, scores, news and highlights
news.description: The Eastern and Western Conference playoff brackets are set after Sunday's games. See the full schedule of games.

news.headline: 'It's all basketball': LaMelo says no rift with Bam, glad he's OK
news.description: LaMelo Ball of the Charlotte Hornets says he's relieved that Miami Heat star Bam Adebayo wasn't more hurt after the run-in with Ball in the second quarter.

news.headline: 2025-26 NBA championship odds: Thunder, Celtics favored in respective conferences
news.description: The Thunder and Celtics are the favorites to represent their conferences in the NBA Finals.

news.headline: Inside Hornets' metamorphosis into the NBA's buzziest team
news.description: A win against the Orlando Magic on Friday would snap the NBA's longest current playoff drought.

news.headline: NBA awards 2026: Bontemps' ballot for MVP, top rookie, every honor
news.description: Which award battles are too close to call? Tim Bontemps unveils his official ballot for MVP, All-NBA, Sixth Man and every major honor.

news.headline: Spoelstra: No need to penalize Hornets' Ball any further
news.description: Heat head coach Erik Spoelstra said Thursday that LaMelo Ball didn't need to be "penalized more moving forward" in the wake of the Hornets star's fine for tripping Miami's Bam Adebayo.

news.headline: Hornets' Ball fined $60K total for pair of play-in incidents
news.description: The NBA has fined LaMelo Ball $35,000 "for making unnecessary and reckless contact" with Bam Adebayo during Tuesday's play-in game. The Hornets star also was fined $25,000 for using profane language during a TV interview after that game.

news.headline: Sources: NBA probing Ball trip of Adebayo in Heat-Hornets
news.description: The NBA is investigating LaMelo Ball's trip of Bam Adebayo, which resulted in the Miami Heat star's lower back injury during Tuesday's play-in game against the Charlotte Hornets, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

news.headline: Should LaMelo have been ejected for tripping Bam?
news.description: Iman Shumpert and Vincent Goodwill discuss LaMelo Ball tripping Bam Adebayo in the Hornets' win over the Heat.

news.headline: Spoelstra: LaMelo 'should have been thrown out of the game'
news.description: Erik Spoelstra reacts to LaMelo Ball tripping Bam Adebayo while Ball affirms that he was unaware of the incident.

news.headline: Grades for all 30 NBA teams after the 2025-26 regular season
news.description: Did your team meet its preseason projections? Tim Bontemps grades all 30, from surprise contenders to franchises banking on lottery luck.﻿

news.headline: NBA play-in tournament: Results, best moments from Tuesday's games
news.description: Here are the best moments from Tuesday's NBA play-in games, which saw victories for Charlotte and Portland.

news.headline: Erik Spoelstra doesn't hold back when asked about Bam Adebayo's injury
news.description: Erik Spoelstra shares his thoughts on the play that took Heat star Bam Adebayo out of the game vs. the Hornets.

data_facts.title: 3-4 Over the Final Two Weeks
data_facts.body: Miami went 3-4 over the final 14 days of the season, finishing at 43-39 on the year.

data_facts.title: 10th Seed in the East
data_facts.body: Miami finished as the 10th seed (0.524), 17.0 GB of first. Eliminated in play-in tournament.

data_facts.title: Ended on a 2-Game Winning Streak
data_facts.body: The Heat finished the season on a 2-game winning streak.

data_facts.title: Season ORtg: 114.4
data_facts.body: Miami's season ORtg of 114.4. Final stretch: 129.3.

data_facts.title: Season 3P%: 36.0%
data_facts.body: Shot 36.0% from three on the season. Final stretch: 42.3%.
